meta.title: PRODUCTION_DATA_SELECTION_MANIFEST
decisions: Forms 21, 22, and 23 are excluded from production. Lee will manually create any desired condo listing form after launch.
No form-23 lineage transformation — form 23 is excluded entirely.
Soft-deleted collections 4, 9, 12, and 14 are excluded, along with test collection 7.
Packet 2 retains DELETED packet forms 25 and 26 and their historical field instances.
Lee Auth UUID e26c8f57-… is preserved; no adaptive replacement UUID.
